title: JGIFTI
description: JSON Schema for the JGIFTI format: a JSON/Binary JSON extension to the GIFTI surface format (Draft-1). See https://neurojson.org/jgifti/draft1

RGBAColor.description: RGBA color as four floats in [0.0, 1.0]: [R, G, B, A]

Matrix4x4.description: 4×4 affine transformation matrix stored as an array of four row arrays

CoordSystem.description: Coordinate system transformation between two named spaces

DataSpace.description: Name of the source coordinate space

TransformedSpace.description: Name of the target coordinate space

CoordSystemOrArray.description: A single coordinate system or an array of coordinate systems

LabelEntry.description: A single label definition with an optional RGBA color

LabelEntryWithKey.description: A label definition including an explicit integer key (array form of LabelTable)

LabelTable.description: Mapping of integer label indices to names and colors. May be an object (string keys) or an array (with explicit Key fields).

oneOf.description: Object form: string-encoded integer keys map to label entries
Array form: each element carries an explicit Key field

FileMetaData.description: File-level metadata key-value pairs stored in GIFTIHeader

Date.description: Date and time the file was written

UserName.description: Name of the user who wrote the file

GIFTIHeader.description: File-level header containing version, metadata, label table, and default coordinate system

AnnotatedArray.description: JData annotated array carrying type, size, and optional compression metadata

_ArraySize_.description: Array dimensions, e.g. [N, 3] for vertex coordinates

_ArrayZipType_.description: Compression algorithm applied to the data

_ArrayZipSize_.description: Uncompressed array dimensions (required when _ArrayZipType_ is set)

_ArrayZipEndian_.description: Byte order of the compressed data

DataLink.description: Reference to data stored in an external file or at a JSONPath within the same document

_DataLink_.description: A URL (e.g. file://./subj01.coord.jgii) or a JSONPath (e.g. $.GIFTIData.P001_L_pial.MeshTri3.Data)

DataField.description: Mesh data: a direct JSON array, a JData annotated array, or a DataLink reference

oneOf.description: Direct JSON array of values or sub-arrays

PropertyArray.description: Per-node property data: a direct JSON array or a JData annotated array

DataInfoMetaData.description: Per-DataArray metadata key-value pairs stored inside _DataInfo_

GeometricType.description: Geometric representation type of the surface

TopologicalType.description: Topological type of the mesh (for MeshTri3)

UniqueID.description: UUID string uniquely identifying this DataArray

Name.description: Short name for display or identification of property data

intent_p1.description: First statistical parameter (e.g. degrees of freedom)

DataInfo.description: Per-DataArray metadata container analogous to GIFTI's DataArray-level MetaData and CoordinateSystemTransformMatrix

Properties.description: Per-node data arrays stored on a MeshVertex3 object. Each array must have length N (number of vertices). Custom property names are permitted.

NodeIndex.description: Sparse node indices for partial-coverage data (K×1)

HbO.description: fNIRS oxy-hemoglobin concentration in µM (N×1 or N×T)

HbR.description: fNIRS deoxy-hemoglobin concentration in µM (N×1 or N×T)

HbT.description: fNIRS total hemoglobin concentration in µM (N×1 or N×T)

AbsorptionCoefficient.description: fNIRS absorption coefficient in 1/mm (N×1 or N×T)

MeshVertex3.description: JMesh vertex object: N×3 vertex coordinates and associated per-node properties

MeshTri3.description: JMesh triangle index object: M×3 array of 1-based vertex indices defining triangular faces

Data.description: M×3 array of 1-based triangle vertex indices (integer)

SurfaceObject.description: A named anatomical surface (Scenario 3) containing a MeshVertex3 and/or MeshTri3. The key is an anatomy ID such as P001_L_pial following the <subject>_<hemisphere>_<surface> convention.

GIFTIData.description: Top-level mesh data container. In Scenarios 1 and 2, MeshVertex3 and/or MeshTri3 appear directly as properties. In Scenario 3, each property key is an anatomy ID (e.g. P001_L_pial) whose value is a SurfaceObject.
